active_ingredients: Active ingredients Menthol 0.44% w/w White petrolatum 53% w/w Zinc oxide 20.6% w/w
indications_and_usage: Uses for the temporary relief of anorectal itching and discomfort in the perianal area associated with anorectal inflammation temporarily forms a protective coating over inflamed tissues to help prevent drying of tissues temporarily protects irritated areas temporarily relieves burning provides temporary relief from skin irritations temporarily protects the inflamed irritated anorectal surface to help make bowel movements less painful temporarily protects inflamed perianal skin temporarily relieves the symptoms of perianal skin irritation may provide a cooling sensation
dosage_and_administration: Directions adults : when practical, cleanse the affected area with mild soap and warm water and rinse thoroughly. Gently dry by patting or blotting with toilet tissue or a soft cloth before application of this product. Apply to the affected area up to 6 times daily Children under 12 years of age : consult a doctor
